name: og-home
subject: a long deep crack splitting the asphalt of a wet city street
setting: shot at street level, low camera angle just above the road surface, the crack running diagonally into the distance
physicalDetail: rainwater pooled inside the crack reflecting amber sodium streetlight, oil sheen on the wet asphalt around it, fine grit and gravel at the crack's edges
light: single warm amber sodium streetlamp out of frame above the right edge, wet pavement reflecting its glow, deep falloff into the surrounding darkness
weather: after a recent rain, glossy wet asphalt, no precipitation now
mood: quiet civic dusk, no people, no traffic, a witnessed wound

name: og-features
subject: an open weathered field notebook lying on a wet city curb beside a fountain pen
setting: tight overhead-angle still life on a granite curb, the asphalt of the street visible at the edge of the frame, slightly out of focus
physicalDetail: the notebook's pages catching warm streetlight, faint indentation marks in the paper but no readable text, the pen with a brass cap, a single drop of water beading on the cover
light: raking warm sodium streetlight from the upper-left, deep shadow under the pen, soft falloff into the wet curb beyond
weather: after rain, glossy wet stone and asphalt
mood: investigative quiet, the moment before evidence is recorded

name: og-about
subject: an anonymous gloved hand setting an orange hazard cone on a damaged section of road at dusk
setting: low side-angle just above the asphalt, the hand entering from the right edge of frame, no face visible, only the lower forearm and gloved hand
physicalDetail: weathered work glove, the cone's reflective stripe catching amber light, asphalt cracks visible around the placement spot
light: amber sodium streetlight from upper-right, deep blue dusk filling the surrounding street
weather: dry but cooling evening, no precipitation
mood: civic care, mutual repair, anonymous labor

name: og-blog
subject: a stack of weathered manila folders and a closed leather notebook on a heavy wooden desk
setting: tight three-quarter still life, a brass desk lamp visible in the upper-right edge of frame casting a single pool of warm light
physicalDetail: the folder edges showing wear and creasing, the leather notebook with a worn elastic strap, dust motes faintly visible in the lamp beam, no readable labels or letters anywhere
light: single warm tungsten desk lamp from upper-right, deep falloff into navy shadow at the edges of the desk
mood: the archivist's hour, civic memory at rest

name: og-feedback
subject: a single illuminated window high in a dark brick tenement facade at night
setting: wide low-angle view of a multi-story brick building from across a quiet street, the building filling most of the frame, only one window glowing warm amber while all the others remain dark
physicalDetail: the lit window's amber glow catching the surrounding brickwork, fine fire-escape ironwork in silhouette, a hint of curtain shadow inside the lit window
light: the lit window itself is the only light source visible, deep navy shadows filling the rest of the facade
mood: a single voice still on, civic light in the dark

name: og-privacy
subject: a tall wrought-iron security fence at dusk, viewed at a slight three-quarter angle
setting: the fence runs across the foreground from left to right, deep open atmosphere behind it, glimpses of a courtyard beyond visible between the bars
physicalDetail: ornate ironwork with weathered black paint, raindrops beaded on the bars, alternating bands of light and shadow falling through the bars onto the ground
light: warm amber sodium streetlight from behind the fence creating raking backlight through the bars, deep navy shadow on the camera-side
mood: sealed but visible, trust held with care

name: og-roadmap
subject: a long empty two-lane rural highway receding into morning mist
setting: low centered angle on the road's centerline, painted lane lines receding to the vanishing point, distant fog softening the horizon
physicalDetail: fresh asphalt with faint tire-track polish, dew beaded on the road surface, scattered yellow leaves at the shoulder
light: warm golden-hour backlight from the vanishing point, low and direct, casting long shadows toward the camera
weather: morning mist hanging in the trees on either side of the road
mood: open horizon, forward motion, the road ahead

name: blog-3b-pothole
subject: a deep ragged pothole filled with rainwater, viewed from a low angle just above the asphalt
setting: extreme close-up almost macro, the pothole filling most of the lower two-thirds of the frame, a slice of overcast sky reflected in the water surface
physicalDetail: rainbow oil sheen swirling on the water's surface, jagged fractured asphalt edges around the rim, exposed aggregate gravel inside, faint amber reflection from a streetlight at the water's edge
light: cool overcast sky reflected in the water, single warm amber sodium streetlight glow from upper-right rim
weather: after heavy rain, fully saturated water in the pothole
mood: intimate documentary, civic decay observed up close

name: blog-legal-obligation

mood: civic gravitas in stone

name: blog-311-broken
subject: a single dim sodium streetlamp glowing through heavy rain at night

light: single warm amber sodium lamp as the only light source, deep navy fill everywhere else

name: blog-freeze-thaw

physicalDetail: delicate fractal ice crystals visible in sharp detail, the asphalt surrounding the crack rough and granular, a faint amber streetlight glow at the upper edge of frame contrasting the cold blue of the ice
light: cold blue dawn light from above, warm amber accent at one edge, sharp contrast between cold and warm
weather: frigid winter morning, frost active on the surface
mood: physics made visible, climate destroying infrastructure at the molecular scale

name: play-feature-graphic
